---
title: "Co-accessibility of ENCODE cCRE pairs around high/low pausing genes"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
suppressMessages(library(data.table))
suppressMessages(library(tidyverse))
suppressMessages(library(reshape2))
suppressMessages(library(GenomicRanges))
suppressMessages(library(plyranges))
suppressMessages(library(patchwork))
suppressMessages(library(ggplot2))

# Local copies of the helper functions needed from:
# source("/project/spott/kevinluo/Fiber_seq/fiberhub/code/process_fiberseq_data.R")
#
# Keeping them here makes this notebook self-contained for co-accessibility.
extract_fire_read_info <- function(fire, RIDs = NULL, remove_unknown_hap = FALSE, remove_multi_hap = FALSE) {
  if (is.character(fire)) {
    fire <- data.table::fread(fire)
  }

  colnames(fire) <- c("chr", "start", "end", "RID", "score", "strand", "x1", "x2", "rgb", "fire_score", "hap")

  rids_df <- fire %>%
    dplyr::group_by(RID) %>%
    dplyr::reframe(chr = chr[1], start = min(start), end = max(end), strand = strand[1], hap = unique(hap))

  if (!is.null(RIDs)) {
    rids_df <- dplyr::filter(rids_df, RID %in% RIDs)
    rids_df <- dplyr::mutate(rids_df, RID = factor(RID, levels = RIDs)) %>% dplyr::arrange(RID)
  } else {
    rids_df <- dplyr::mutate(rids_df, RID = factor(RID)) %>% dplyr::arrange(RID)
  }

  if (remove_unknown_hap) {
    rids_df <- dplyr::filter(rids_df, hap %in% c("H1", "H2"))
  }

  if (remove_multi_hap) {
    duplicated_rids <- unique(rids_df$RID[duplicated(rids_df$RID)])
    if (length(duplicated_rids) > 0) {
      cat(paste("Warning: Remove", length(duplicated_rids), "RIDs with different haplotype tags!\n"))
      rids_df <- rids_df %>% dplyr::filter(!RID %in% duplicated_rids)
    }
  }

  rids_df
}

test_coaccess_fire_elements <- function(read_info.gr, fire_elements.gr, region1, region2, pseudocount = 1, verbose = FALSE) {
  region1.gr <- as(region1, "GRanges")
  region2.gr <- as(region2, "GRanges")
  if (length(region1.gr) != 1) {
    stop("region1 could only have one region!")
  }
  if (length(region2.gr) != 1) {
    stop("region2 could only have one region!")
  }

  regions.gr <- c(region1.gr, region2.gr)

  reads_overlap_region1.gr <- subsetByOverlaps(read_info.gr, region1.gr)
  reads_overlap_region2.gr <- subsetByOverlaps(read_info.gr, region2.gr)
  RIDs_overlap_both_regions <- intersect(reads_overlap_region1.gr$RID, reads_overlap_region2.gr$RID)

  if (verbose) {
    cat(length(read_info.gr), "reads.\n")
    cat(length(reads_overlap_region1.gr), "reads overlapping region 1.\n")
    cat(length(reads_overlap_region2.gr), "reads overlapping region 2.\n")
    cat(length(RIDs_overlap_both_regions), "reads overlapping both regions.\n")
  }

  selected_fire_elements.gr <- fire_elements.gr[fire_elements.gr$RID %in% RIDs_overlap_both_regions]
  fire_overlap_region1.gr <- subsetByOverlaps(selected_fire_elements.gr, region1.gr)
  fire_overlap_region2.gr <- subsetByOverlaps(selected_fire_elements.gr, region2.gr)

  if (length(fire_overlap_region1.gr) > 0 && length(fire_overlap_region2.gr) > 0) {
    RIDs_access.df <- data.frame(
      RID = RIDs_overlap_both_regions,
      fire_region1 = FALSE,
      fire_region2 = FALSE
    )
    RIDs_access.df$fire_region1[RIDs_access.df$RID %in% fire_overlap_region1.gr$RID] <- TRUE
    RIDs_access.df$fire_region2[RIDs_access.df$RID %in% fire_overlap_region2.gr$RID] <- TRUE
    RIDs_access.df$fire_region1 <- factor(RIDs_access.df$fire_region1, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))
    RIDs_access.df$fire_region2 <- factor(RIDs_access.df$fire_region2, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))
    contingency_table <- table(RIDs_access.df[, c("fire_region1", "fire_region2")])

    if (nrow(contingency_table) == 2 && ncol(contingency_table) == 2) {
      fisher_res <- fisher.test(contingency_table + pseudocount)
    } else {
      fisher_res <- NA
    }
  } else {
    RIDs_access.df <- NA
    contingency_table <- NA
    fisher_res <- NA
  }

  list(
    regions.gr = regions.gr,
    RIDs_access.df = RIDs_access.df,
    contingency_table = contingency_table,
    fisher_res = fisher_res
  )
}

test_coaccess_regions <- test_coaccess_fire_elements

extract_region_fire_result <- function(region,
                                       fire_name,
                                       bam_file,
                                       fire_dir,
                                       outname,
                                       out_dir,
                                       code_dir = getwd(),
                                       code_file = "extract_region_fire_result.sh",
                                       skip_if_exist = TRUE,
                                       dry_run = FALSE) {
  if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) {
    dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  }

  result_dir <- file.path(out_dir, outname, "parsed")
  cmd <- paste(
    "sh",
    shQuote(file.path(code_dir, code_file)),
    shQuote(fire_name),
    shQuote(bam_file),
    shQuote(fire_dir),
    shQuote(region),
    shQuote(outname),
    shQuote(out_dir)
  )
  if (dry_run) {
    cat(paste0("Run command:\n", cmd, "\n"))
  } else if (!file.exists(file.path(result_dir, "fire.bed")) || !skip_if_exist) {
    cat(paste0("Run command:\n", cmd, "\n"))
    try(system(cmd))
  }

  result_dir
}
```

## Parameters

```{r params}
# Required inputs
sample_name <- "AL16_bc2114_18508"  # used to read FIRE results and name outputs
bam_file <- "/project/spott/1_Shared_projects/LCL_Fiber_seq/preprocess_final_merged_samples/AL16_bc2114_18508.5mC.6mA.aligned.phased.bam"
fire_dir <- file.path("/project/spott/1_Shared_projects/LCL_Fiber_seq/FIRE/results", sample_name)
sample_fire_dir <- fire_dir
out_dir <- "/project/spott/cshan/fiber-seq/results/co_accessibility"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Gene annotation RDS built from hg38 annotations
# It must be a list with $genes as a GRanges that includes gene_name
# See README for how to build this file.
genomic_annots_rds <- "/project/spott/cshan/fiber-seq/results/co_accessibility/inputs/genomic.annots.hg38.rds"

# Gene lists (one gene symbol per line)
high_gene_list_file <- "/project/spott/cshan/fiber-seq/results/co_accessibility/inputs/high_pausing_genes.txt"
low_gene_list_file <- "/project/spott/cshan/fiber-seq/results/co_accessibility/inputs/low_pausing_genes.txt"

# ENCODE cCREs (SCREEN v4 BED)
cre_bed <- "/project/spott/cshan/annotations/GRCh38-cCREs.bed"
coaccess_code_dir <- "/project/spott/cshan/fiber-seq/code/PolII_footprints_code/co_accessibility"
fire_version <- "v0.1"

# Analysis options
selected_chr <- c("chr1")  # can be multiple chromosomes
tss_flank <- 10000
min_dist <- 500
max_dist <- 10000
pseudocount <- 1
ncore <- 4
```

## Load inputs

```{r load-inputs}
stopifnot(file.exists(genomic_annots_rds))
stopifnot(file.exists(cre_bed))
stopifnot(file.exists(high_gene_list_file))
stopifnot(file.exists(low_gene_list_file))

# Load gene annotations
# Expecting genomic.annots$genes as GRanges
# If gene_name is missing, fall back to gene_id

genomic.annots <- readRDS(genomic_annots_rds)
if (!"genes" %in% names(genomic.annots)) {
  stop("genomic.annots must include a $genes GRanges")
}

gene.annots <- genomic.annots$genes
if (!"gene_name" %in% colnames(mcols(gene.annots))) {
  if ("gene_id" %in% colnames(mcols(gene.annots))) {
    mcols(gene.annots)$gene_name <- mcols(gene.annots)$gene_id
  } else {
    stop("gene annotations must include gene_name or gene_id")
  }
}

read_gene_list <- function(path) {
  genes <- readr::read_lines(path)
  genes <- genes[!is.na(genes)]
  genes <- trimws(genes)
  genes <- genes[genes != ""]
  unique(genes)
}

high_genes <- read_gene_list(high_gene_list_file)
low_genes <- read_gene_list(low_gene_list_file)

# Load ENCODE cCREs
CREs <- data.table::fread(cre_bed)
colnames(CREs) <- c("chr", "start", "end", "accession1", "accession2", "CRE_label")
CREs <- CREs %>% dplyr::mutate(start = start + 1) # convert 0-based to 1-based
CREs <- CREs %>% dplyr::mutate(CRE_ID = paste0(accession1, ".", accession2, ".", CRE_label))
CREs.gr <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(CREs, keep.extra.columns = TRUE)

# Load FIRE peaks and elements (sample-level)
fire_peaks_file <- file.path(sample_fire_dir, paste0(sample_name, "-fire-", fire_version, "-peaks.bed.gz"))
fire_elements_file <- file.path(
  sample_fire_dir,
  paste0("additional-outputs-", fire_version, "/fire-peaks/", sample_name, "-", fire_version, "-fire-elements.bed.gz")
)
stopifnot(file.exists(fire_peaks_file))
stopifnot(file.exists(fire_elements_file))

fire_peaks <- data.table::fread(fire_peaks_file)
colnames(fire_peaks)[1] <- "chrom"
fire_peaks <- fire_peaks %>% dplyr::select(chr = chrom, start = peak_start, end = peak_end)
fire_peaks <- fire_peaks %>% dplyr::mutate(start = start + 1) # convert 0-based to 1-based
fire_peaks.gr <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(fire_peaks)

fire_elements <- data.table::fread(fire_elements_file)
colnames(fire_elements) <- c("chr", "start", "end", "RID", "score", "strand",
                             "x1", "x2", "rgb", "fire_score", "tag")
fire_elements <- fire_elements %>% dplyr::mutate(start = start + 1) # convert 0-based to 1-based
fire_elements <- fire_elements %>% dplyr::select(c("chr", "start", "end", "RID", "score", "strand", "tag"))
fire_elements <- fire_elements %>% dplyr::mutate(FIRE_ID = paste0(RID, "_", chr, ":", start, "-", end, "_", strand))
fire_elements.gr <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(fire_elements, keep.extra.columns = TRUE)
```

## Run co-accessibility for a gene list

```{r helpers}
make_gene_windows <- function(gene_annots_gr, gene_list, flank) {
  gene.locs.df <- as.data.frame(gene_annots_gr)
  if (!"tss" %in% colnames(gene.locs.df) || all(is.na(gene.locs.df$tss))) {
    gene.locs.df$tss <- ifelse(gene.locs.df$strand == "+", gene.locs.df$start, gene.locs.df$end)
  }
  gene_windows.df <- gene.locs.df %>%
    dplyr::filter(gene_name %in% gene_list) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(window_start = tss - flank, window_end = tss + flank) %>%
    dplyr::select(chr = seqnames, start = window_start, end = window_end, gene_name, strand)
  makeGRangesFromDataFrame(gene_windows.df, keep.extra.columns = TRUE)
}

run_coaccess_for_gene_list <- function(gene_list, label) {
  label_dir <- file.path(out_dir, label)
  dir.create(label_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  for (chr in selected_chr) {
    cat("\nRunning", label, "on", chr, "...\n")

    gene.annots.chr <- gene.annots[seqnames(gene.annots) == chr]
    gene_windows.gr <- make_gene_windows(gene.annots.chr, gene_list, tss_flank)
    if (length(gene_windows.gr) == 0) {
      cat("No gene windows for", label, "on", chr, "\n")
      next
    }

    CREs.chr <- CREs.gr[seqnames(CREs.gr) == chr]
    fire_peaks.chr <- fire_peaks.gr[seqnames(fire_peaks.gr) == chr]
    fire_elements.chr <- fire_elements.gr[seqnames(fire_elements.gr) == chr]

    # Select CREs that overlap FIRE peaks
    CREs_with_fire.gr <- subsetByOverlaps(CREs.chr, fire_peaks.chr)

    # Find gene windows that contain CREs
    gene_windows_CREs.gr <- plyranges::join_overlap_inner(gene_windows.gr, CREs_with_fire.gr)

    genes_with_multi_CREs.df <- gene_windows_CREs.gr %>%
      group_by(gene_name) %>%
      summarise(n_CRE = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
      as.data.frame()

    genes_with_multi_CREs <- genes_with_multi_CREs.df$gene_name[genes_with_multi_CREs.df$n_CRE > 1]
    if (length(genes_with_multi_CREs) == 0) {
      cat("No multi-CRE genes for", label, "on", chr, "\n")
      next
    }

    gene_windows_CREs.gr <- gene_windows_CREs.gr[gene_windows_CREs.gr$gene_name %in% genes_with_multi_CREs]

    # Extract results for the gene windows
    parallel::mclapply(genes_with_multi_CREs, function(x) {
      gene_range.gr <- gene_windows.gr[gene_windows.gr$gene_name == x]
      if (length(gene_range.gr) > 1) {
        n_CREs <- sapply(1:length(gene_range.gr), function(i) {
          length(subjectHits(findOverlaps(gene_range.gr[i], CREs_with_fire.gr)))
        })
        gene_range.gr <- gene_range.gr[which.max(n_CREs)]
      }
      region_str <- sprintf("%s:%s-%s", seqnames(gene_range.gr), start(gene_range.gr), end(gene_range.gr))
      outname <- paste0(sample_name, "_", x, "_", region_str)
      extract_region_fire_result(region_str, sample_name, bam_file, fire_dir, outname, label_dir, code_dir = coaccess_code_dir)
    }, mc.cores = ncore)

    # Find co-accessible CREs in each gene window
    coaccess_file <- file.path(label_dir, paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_", label, "_CREs_around_genes_coaccess_res.rds"))

    coaccess_res <- parallel::mclapply(genes_with_multi_CREs, function(x) {
      tmp_gene_window_CREs.gr <- gene_windows_CREs.gr[gene_windows_CREs.gr$gene_name == x]
      gene_range.gr <- gene_windows.gr[gene_windows.gr$gene_name == x]
      if (length(gene_range.gr) > 1) {
        n_CREs <- sapply(1:length(gene_range.gr), function(i) {
          length(subjectHits(findOverlaps(gene_range.gr[i], CREs_with_fire.gr)))
        })
        gene_range.gr <- gene_range.gr[which.max(n_CREs)]
      }
      tmp_CREs.gr <- CREs_with_fire.gr[CREs_with_fire.gr$CRE_ID %in% tmp_gene_window_CREs.gr$CRE_ID]

      n_CREs <- length(tmp_CREs.gr)
      all_pairs <- expand.grid(CRE1 = tmp_CREs.gr$CRE_ID, CRE2 = tmp_CREs.gr$CRE_ID)
      all_pairs <- all_pairs[all_pairs$CRE1 != all_pairs$CRE2, ]
      sorted_pairs <- apply(all_pairs, 1, function(row) paste(sort(row), collapse = "_"))
      all_pairs <- all_pairs[!duplicated(sorted_pairs), ]

      gene_coaccess_res <- NULL
      if (nrow(all_pairs) > 0) {
        all_pairs$CRE_pair <- paste0(all_pairs$CRE1, "-", all_pairs$CRE2)
        all_pairs$dist <- NA
        for (i in 1:nrow(all_pairs)) {
          CRE1.gr <- tmp_CREs.gr[tmp_CREs.gr$CRE_ID == all_pairs$CRE1[i]]
          CRE2.gr <- tmp_CREs.gr[tmp_CREs.gr$CRE_ID == all_pairs$CRE2[i]]
          all_pairs$dist[i] <- distance(CRE1.gr, CRE2.gr)
        }
        selected_pairs <- all_pairs[all_pairs$dist > min_dist & all_pairs$dist < max_dist, ]

        if (nrow(selected_pairs) > 0) {
          region_str <- sprintf("%s:%s-%s", seqnames(gene_range.gr), start(gene_range.gr), end(gene_range.gr))
          outname <- paste0(sample_name, "_", x, "_", region_str)
          result_dir <- file.path(label_dir, outname, "parsed")

          read_info.df <- extract_fire_read_info(file.path(result_dir, "fire.bed"), remove_unknown_hap = FALSE)
          read_info.df <- read_info.df %>% dplyr::mutate(start = start + 1)
          read_info.gr <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(read_info.df, keep.extra.columns = TRUE)

          gene_coaccess_res <- vector("list", length = nrow(selected_pairs))
          names(gene_coaccess_res) <- selected_pairs$CRE_pair
          for (i in 1:nrow(selected_pairs)) {
            selected_pair <- selected_pairs[i, ]
            CRE1_ID <- selected_pair$CRE1
            CRE2_ID <- selected_pair$CRE2
            CRE1.gr <- tmp_CREs.gr[tmp_CREs.gr$CRE_ID == CRE1_ID]
            CRE2.gr <- tmp_CREs.gr[tmp_CREs.gr$CRE_ID == CRE2_ID]
            gene_coaccess_res[[i]] <- test_coaccess_regions(
              read_info.gr,
              fire_elements.chr,
              CRE1.gr,
              CRE2.gr,
              pseudocount = pseudocount
            )
          }
        }
      }
      gene_coaccess_res
    }, mc.cores = ncore)

    names(coaccess_res) <- genes_with_multi_CREs
    saveRDS(coaccess_res, file = coaccess_file)

    # Collect co-accessibility statistics
    genes <- names(coaccess_res)
    coaccess_stat_list <- parallel::mclapply(genes, function(gene_name) {
      gene_coaccess_res <- coaccess_res[[gene_name]]
      if (length(gene_coaccess_res) > 0) {
        gene_coaccess_stat_list <- lapply(gene_coaccess_res, function(x) {
          if (!anyNA(x$fisher_res)) {
            CRE1 <- x$regions.gr$CRE_ID[1]
            CRE2 <- x$regions.gr$CRE_ID[2]
            dist <- distance(x$regions.gr[1], x$regions.gr[2])
            data.frame(
              gene_name = gene_name,
              CRE1 = CRE1,
              CRE2 = CRE2,
              CRE_pair = paste0(CRE1, "-", CRE2),
              dist = dist,
              n_shared_reads = nrow(x$RIDs_access.df),
              co_access = as.integer(x$contingency_table[2, 2]) - pseudocount,
              co_inaccess = as.integer(x$contingency_table[1, 1]) - pseudocount,
              CRE1_access = as.integer(x$contingency_table[2, 1]) - pseudocount,
              CRE2_access = as.integer(x$contingency_table[1, 2]) - pseudocount,
              OR = x$fisher_res$estimate,
              pval = x$fisher_res$p.value
            )
          } else {
            NULL
          }
        })
        gene_coaccess_stat_list <- gene_coaccess_stat_list[!sapply(gene_coaccess_stat_list, is.null)]
        if (length(gene_coaccess_stat_list) > 0) {
          gene_coaccess_stat_df <- do.call(rbind, gene_coaccess_stat_list)
          rownames(gene_coaccess_stat_df) <- NULL
          gene_coaccess_stat_df
        } else {
          NULL
        }
      }
    }, mc.cores = ncore)

    names(coaccess_stat_list) <- genes
    coaccess_stat_df <- do.call(rbind, coaccess_stat_list)
    if (!is.null(coaccess_stat_df)) {
      rownames(coaccess_stat_df) <- NULL
      saveRDS(
        coaccess_stat_df,
        file = file.path(label_dir, paste0(sample_name, "_", chr, "_", label, "_CREs_around_genes_coaccess_stat_df.rds"))
      )
    }
  }
}
```

## Run analysis

```{r run-analysis}
run_coaccess_for_gene_list(high_genes, "high_pausing")
run_coaccess_for_gene_list(low_genes, "low_pausing")
```
